initial_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R >= 0, R < N.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C >= 0, C < M.

output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

copy_top_to_bottom(R, C, V) :- input(R0, C0, V), V != 5, R0 < N / 2,
                                 n_rows(N), n_cols(M), row(R), col(C),
                                 (R0 + (N / 2)) \ N = R,
                                 (C0 + (M / 2)) \ M = C.

copy_top_original(R, C, V) :- input(R0, C0, V), V != 5, R0 < N / 2,
                               n_rows(N), n_cols(M), row(R), col(C),
                               R = R0, C = C0.

copy_bottom_to_top(R, C, V) :- input(R0, C0, V), V != 5, R0 >= N / 2,
                             n_rows(N), n_cols(M), row(R), col(C),
                             (R0 + (N / 2)) \ N = R,
                             (C0 + ((M / 2) - (M \ 2) - 1)) \ M = C.

copy_bottom_original(R, C, V) :- input(R0, C0, V), V != 5, R0 >= N / 2,
                                 n_rows(N), n_cols(M), row(R), col(C),
                                 R = R0, C = C0.

output(R, C, V) :- copy_top_to_bottom(R, C, V).
output(R, C, V) :- copy_top_original(R, C, V).
output(R, C, V) :- copy_bottom_to_top(R, C, V).
output(R, C, V) :- copy_bottom_original(R, C, V).

any_copy(R, C, V) :- copy_top_to_bottom(R, C, V).
any_copy(R, C, V) :- copy_top_original(R, C, V).
any_copy(R, C, V) :- copy_bottom_to_top(R, C, V).
any_copy(R, C, V) :- copy_bottom_original(R, C, V).

:- output(R, C, V), not any_copy(R, C, V), V != 0.

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color( Color ) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

#show output/3.
